Name: Grove Connectors
Purpose: JLCPCB is out of stock so I need to get these and solder them myself

Name: Grove Cables (5pc)
Purpose: Connect the modules which have the Grove connectors

Name: PVC tubing
Purpose: Tubing for DC water pump to transport water to plant

Name: 0.96" OLED Display
Purpose: To display information to user (soil humidity, time until next watering)

Name: LiPo battery
Purpose: To power the RP2040 so that I don't need to keep the USB plugged into something - modular design

Name: Soil Moisture Sensor
Purpose: To sense soil moisture. Comes with the Grove cable

Name: 4.5V DC Water Pump
Purpose: To pump water so that the plants can be watered.

Name: BME280
Purpose: Breakout is cheaper than PCB assembly so I decided to get a breakout of the BME280 for sensing rather than PCB
